---
title: ""
page-layout: custom
toc: false
css: ../../novels.css
include-in-header:
  - text: |
      <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
      <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
      <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Noto+Serif+SC:wght@300;400;500;600;700&family=EB+Garamond:ital,wght@0,400;0,500;0,600;1,400;1,500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
---

::: {.novels-page}

::: {.novel-detail-hero}
::: {.novel-detail-hero-inner}
::: {.novel-detail-cover}
![漫长的求证](../../files/novels/漫长的求证.jpg){.cover-img}
:::
::: {.novel-detail-header}
[长篇小说 &middot; 三部十六章]{.novels-label-en}

# 漫长的求证 {.novel-detail-title}

[沉 &middot; 隧 &middot; 渠]{.novel-detail-subtitle}

::: {.novel-detail-synopsis}
县城的水泥台阶上，一个女孩蹲在那里用粉笔写统计物理的公式，一个男孩蹲在旁边替她挡风。后来劳燕分飞，纸页一翻，天便换了颜色。他带着一本卷了边的旧课本去了大洋彼岸，扉页上那行铅笔小字，成了此后所有公式的源头。
:::

[&larr; 返回小说列表](../../novels.qmd){.novel-back-link}

:::
:::
:::

::: {.novels-content}

::: {.novel-toc-section}

::: {.novel-part}
::: {.novel-part-header}
::: {.novel-part-number}
第一部
:::

## 沉 {.novel-part-title}
:::

::: {.novel-chapter-list}

::: {.novel-chapter}
::: {.chapter-number}
一
:::
::: {.chapter-title}
粉笔
:::
:::

::: {.novel-chapter}
::: {.chapter-number}
二
:::
::: {.chapter-title}
简并态
:::
:::

::: {.novel-chapter}
::: {.chapter-number}
三
:::
::: {.chapter-title}
断流
:::
:::

::: {.novel-chapter}
::: {.chapter-number}
四
:::
::: {.chapter-title}
开放系统
:::
:::

::: {.novel-chapter}
::: {.chapter-number}
五
:::
::: {.chapter-title}
渡
:::
:::

:::
:::

::: {.novel-part-divider}
:::

::: {.novel-part}
::: {.novel-part-header}
::: {.novel-part-number}
第二部
:::

## 隧 {.novel-part-title}
:::

::: {.novel-chapter-list}

::: {.novel-chapter}
::: {.chapter-number}
六
:::
::: {.chapter-title}
信号与噪声
:::
:::

::: {.novel-chapter}
::: {.chapter-number}
七
:::
::: {.chapter-title}
先验
:::
:::

::: {.novel-chapter}
::: {.chapter-number}
八
:::
::: {.chapter-title}
薄冰
:::
:::

::: {.novel-chapter}
::: {.chapter-number}
九
:::
::: {.chapter-title}
旷野中的灯
:::
:::

::: {.novel-chapter}
::: {.chapter-number}
十
:::
::: {.chapter-title}
基线
:::
:::

::: {.novel-chapter}
::: {.chapter-number}
十一
:::
::: {.chapter-title}
暗物质
:::
:::

::: {.novel-chapter}
::: {.chapter-number}
十二
:::
::: {.chapter-title}
相变
:::
:::

:::
:::

::: {.novel-part-divider}
:::

::: {.novel-part}
::: {.novel-part-header}
::: {.novel-part-number}
第三部
:::

## 渠 {.novel-part-title}
:::

::: {.novel-chapter-list}

::: {.novel-chapter}
::: {.chapter-number}
十三
:::
::: {.chapter-title}
三票
:::
:::

::: {.novel-chapter}
::: {.chapter-number}
十四
:::
::: {.chapter-title}
故人
:::
:::

::: {.novel-chapter}
::: {.chapter-number}
十五
:::
::: {.chapter-title}
薪尽火传
:::
:::

::: {.novel-chapter}
::: {.chapter-number}
十六
:::
::: {.chapter-title}
源头
:::
:::

:::
:::

:::

:::

::: {.novels-footer}
::: {.novels-footer-inner}
"章名并排搁着，前后遥遥照应，草蛇灰线，伏脉千里。"
:::
:::

:::
